title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 85.
content:
There was an Old Man with a beard,
    Who sat on a horse when he reared;
    But they said, "Never mind!
    You will fall off behind,
    You propitious Old Man with a beard!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 85."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
